enhancement: Replace generic stabilization language with specific exemption/current-compliance logic.
whyItMatters: Avoids relying on outdated DSCSA implementation language.
deliverable: Updated DSCSA SOP addendum and customer/partner applicability table
successMeasure: All partner types have documented status and exemption/applicability rationale.

enhancement: Separate responsibilities for manufacturer, wholesaler, dispenser, 3PL, US QA, serialization vendor, and L4 system owner.
whyItMatters: Prevents 3PL unilateral clearance and decision-right ambiguity.
deliverable: Role-based DSCSA RACI and escalation path

enhancement: Separate RMP maintenance, internal escalation thresholds, and FDA 506C notification timing.
whyItMatters: Prevents late notification and internal-control/legal-timing confusion.
deliverable: RMP and shortage notification decision tree
successMeasure: Every covered product has an approved RMP and trigger matrix.

enhancement: Add primary authority citation/section/URL to rows marked citation validation required.
whyItMatters: Moves workbook from working model to audit-ready reference.
successMeasure: Zero rows with 'Not specified in source' in citation where legally material.

enhancement: Use Evidence Register to assign repository, owner, cadence, and inspection use.
whyItMatters: Business leaders need to know exactly what evidence to produce.
deliverable: Evidence inventory and control owner map
successMeasure: Each critical control has evidence owner and repository.

enhancement: Add serialized mismatch, VRS failure, quarantine, Form 3911 support, Part 11/audit trail, and after-hours escalation clauses.
whyItMatters: Most DSCSA operational risk sits at the 3PL/company interface.
successMeasure: No unassigned DSCSA decision rights in QTA.

enhancement: Confirm ERP/WMS/MES/QMS/L4/temperature systems support access control, audit trail, data retention, and review.
whyItMatters: Data integrity failures can invalidate release/distribution decisions.
successMeasure: Critical records have validated systems and audit trail review process.

enhancement: Create tailored views for Supply Chain, QA, Regulatory, Procurement, Legal, IT Quality, Manufacturing, and Clinical Supply.
whyItMatters: Matrix is too dense for business use without role views.
deliverable: Role-specific training deck and quick-reference guide
successMeasure: Owners can explain their controls and evidence.

enhancement: Add N/A rationale, legal review status, product scope, geography, role, and license status to the matrix.
successMeasure: Each domain has documented applicability decision.

enhancement: Add ongoing metrics for DSCSA transmission failures, ATP expirations, RMP mitigation status, audit trail review, temperature excursions, and recall readiness.
whyItMatters: Turns static matrix into compliance operations management.
successMeasure: KPIs reviewed in management review or governance forum.
